SEARCH
Module ProjetGenieLogicel3
Package model

Class FastAgent

java.lang.Object
model.Agent
model.FastAgent
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class FastAgent extends Agent implements Serializable
A faster variant of the standard Agent. Demonstrates system extensibility.

      Creates a fast agent with increased speed.

      currentPosition - starting node
      destination - target node
